text: We raised $21 million to prove AI won't replace insurance brokers.
It'll make the best ones unstoppable.
Novella is a wholesale insurance brokerage built to superpower our producers.
Every producer we hire gets a team of AI agents to help them work.
Instead of passing tasks to a human assistant, our AI agents handle them.
Placement, binding, subjectivities, inspections, policy review and so much more.
Before Novella, most of my days were consumed with the parts outside of selling.
Passing submissions, chasing subjectivities, the actual relationship building part
took up maybe 40% of my time.
Traditionally, there's a ton of service and backend work that star producers get bogged down with
trying to close these deals.
We automate as much of that work as possible so that our producers can be front and center
relationship based with our trading partners.
I did a demo and I was frankly shocked.
Part of me almost doubted it was actually real just because it was so different.
But I don't know, two weeks later we gave it a whirl and everything that was promised was delivered.
Brokers don't care about technology.
They care about outcomes.
Good coverage for a good price.
We make specialty insurance work better for everyone.
Brokers get faster quotes, underwriters get cleaner submissions and customers get better coverage for less money.
Our series A is just the beginning.
We're on a mission to make every producer a super producer.
If you're a retailer, send us a submission.
And if you're a wholesaler, come join our team and let's change how wholesale is done.
